hooks.command: echo 'SessionStart memory + role consult (per AGENTS.md + agents/rules/agent-consult.md): re-read snapshots first. For coordinator/drift work: cat agents/coordinator/chief-coordinator/{charter,memory}.md | head -30; node -e "const i=require(\"./.agent-factory/memory-index.json\"); console.log(\"memory entries:\", i.agent_count, i.entry_count); const cc=i.entries.filter(e=>/chief|coordinator|drift/.test(e.agent_id||e.topic||'')).slice(0,2); console.dir(cc.map(e=>({id:e.id,topic:e.topic})))" 2>/dev/null || true; echo "Use source-of-truth order; map subagent (explore) to repo role only for independent review/implementation that cuts drift cost."; echo "See .agent-factory/memory-index.json and agents/**/memory.md ."; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status 2>/dev/null || true
